---
id: delete-pix-dict-entry
title: "Delete a PIX dictionary entry"
description: "Deletes a specific PIX dictionary entry by its type and key."
sidebar_label: "Delete a PIX dictionary entry"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: Pix Key Management for Baas/Maintenance/pix-key-management
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete a PIX dictionary entry"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/baas/api/v1/pix/dict/entries"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes a specific PIX dictionary entry by its type and key.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"x-delbank-api-key","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"API key for authentication"},{"name":"x-delfinance-account-id","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"Account Number linked to the API key used for validation"},{"name":"IdempotencyKey","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"description":"Unique GUID generated for idempotency"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"entryType":{"type":"string","enum":["DOCUMENT","EMAIL","PHONE","EVP"]},"key":{"type":"string"}},"required":["entryType","key"]},"example":{"entryType":"DOCUMENT","key":"87122911535"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"204":{"description":"No content (entry successfully deleted)"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
